Event: Tavern of Fortune - July 2025
Event Date: 11/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: B36
Magic Grace Bow

When attacking, has a [21%-23%] chance of dealing [80%-95%] damage to a group of enemies.
Once in a while the unit deals pure damage to 3 random enemy units in the amount equal to 25% of their max health and prevents them from being healed for 5 sec. During this time, whenever the targets take 500000 damage, the bow owner recovers 10% health and increases their own stats by 10% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Tavern of Fortune - July 2025

Event date: 11/07/2025

Sage bot code: B36

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
